Minecraft: Pixel Drift是由floopy, Synthion, Hyper Potions, Turbo, meganeko和EX-LYD创作的混音专辑，于2025年9月3日在多平台发布。此专辑是Minecraft: The Wild Update (Original Game Soundtrack), Minecraft: Caves & Cliffs (Original Game Soundtrack), Minecraft: Trails & Tales (Original Game Soundtrack)和Minecraft: Chase the Skies (Original Game Soundtrack)中的部分曲目的混音版本。专辑封面与动画版本由Martin Wörister制作。
